title: poa alternans
intro: Poa alternans, also known as Alternans grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa alternans include treating various ailments such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Poa alternans can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
